rounds.prompt: How many times longer is the Marathon than the first Olympic sprint (stadion)?
rounds.fact: The ancient Greek stadion race was ~192 m (one stadium length); the marathon is 42,195 m — about 220× longer.

rounds.prompt: How many times taller is the highest skydive (Felix Baumgartner) than Everest?
rounds.fact: Everest is 8,849 m; Felix Baumgartner jumped from 39,045 m in 2012 — 4.4× higher than Everest, at the edge of space.

rounds.prompt: How many times farther did Apollo 13 travel (total) than the circumference of Earth?
rounds.fact: Earth's circumference is ~40,075 km; Apollo 13's total journey (Earth–Moon–Earth plus the abort loop) was ~800,000 km — 20× around Earth.

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier can the world's strongest man lift compared to an average person?
rounds.fact: An average untrained person can lift ~60 kg; the world record deadlift is 501 kg (Hafthor Bjornsson, 2020) — 8.4× more.

rounds.prompt: How many times faster did Usain Bolt run 100m than the average human walks it?
rounds.fact: Humans walk at ~5 km/h; Bolt's average speed over his 9.58s world record was ~37.6 km/h — 7.5× faster than a casual stroll.
